explanation: Scroll, Parchment, Papyrus, and Tablet (like a clay tablet) were all ancient materials or surfaces used for writing or inscribing information. A Typewriter is a machine used to create written text, not the medium upon which it is written.

category: Ancient Wonders That No Longer Exist
explanation: All tokens except the Great Pyramid of Giza are among the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World that have been destroyed over time. The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the original seven wonders that is still largely intact and standing today.

category: Words that can function as prepositions
explanation: About, Above, Across, and After can all function as prepositions. 'Always' is an adverb, indicating frequency, and does not serve as a preposition.
